methods.description: Process for extracting DNA from Lobelia columnaris and sequencing it to study genetic information.

steps.description: DNA was extracted from silica-dried leaf samples of 20 individuals of L. columnaris using a modified cetyltrimethylammonium bromide (CTAB) protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using CTAB protocol from leaf samples

steps.description: Library construction, sequence generation, and bioinformatics processing were done at the Indiana University Center for Genomics and Bioinformatics.
steps.searchable_summary: construct library and process sequences at genomics center

steps.description: Sequence generation was performed using Illumina NextSeq and Illumina MiSeq platforms.

methods.description: Acquisition of plastome sequences from external databases for comparative analysis.

steps.description: Downloaded 22 plastome sequences of 22 taxa of Campanulaceae from TreeBASE no. S15797 and GenBank accessions.
steps.searchable_summary: download plastome sequences from TreeBASE and GenBank

steps.description: Included two more plastome sequences of L. columnaris from South Bioko and another from Mt. Cameroon obtained from GenBank.
steps.searchable_summary: include additional plastome sequences from GenBank
